description:
**Milestone:** Prometheus + Grafana Stack

Create docker-compose.monitoring.yml with Prometheus, Grafana, and node-exporter services. Create monitoring/prometheus/prometheus.yml with scrape configs targeting the server metrics endpoint and node-exporter. Create monitoring/grafana/provisioning/datasources/prometheus.yml to auto-configure Prometheus as a Grafana data source. Add a setup-monitoring.sh script that starts the monitoring stack. Grafana accessible on port 3010 with anonymous read-only access for dashboards.

**Files to Modify:**
- docker-compose.monitoring.yml
- monitoring/prometheus/prometheus.yml
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/datasources/prometheus.yml
- monitoring/grafana/grafana.ini
- scripts/setup-monitoring.sh

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] docker compose -f docker-compose.monitoring.yml up -d starts all 3 services
- [ ] Prometheus UI accessible at :9090 and scraping server metrics
- [ ] Grafana accessible at :3010 with Prometheus data source auto-configured
- [ ] node-exporter exposing host metrics at :9100
- [ ] setup-monitoring.sh script works end-to-end
- [ ] All services have health checks and restart policies

**Complexity:** medium
